LLoom
HomeFeaturesDocsDownloadChangelog
L

Local-first AI coding agent

Loom is a private, offline-capable AI coding assistant that works with Ollama, OpenAI, OpenRouter, and more. Type what you want and let AI do the rest.

Install LoomRead the docs
loom
$ loom find the auth bug
[coding] → qwen/qwen3-coder:free (auto-routed)
⚡ readfile
Analyzing src/auth/middleware.ts...
⚡ searchfiles
Found JWT verification in 3 files
✓ The token expiration check uses UTC seconds but the comparison uses milliseconds. Fixed in auth/middleware.ts:42.
Done.

Everything you need, nothing you don't

🖥️

Local-first

Run entirely offline with Ollama. No cloud dependency, no data leaving your machine.

🔌

Multi-provider

Swap between Ollama, OpenAI, OpenRouter, Anthropic, Gemini, Groq — or chain them.

⌨️

Prompt-first

Type natural language prompts. No command memorization needed.

🧠

Auto-routing

Smart task routing picks the right model for coding, research, review, or debugging.

🔧

Tool ecosystem

Read, write, edit files, run shell commands, search code — all through AI.

🔒

Private by design

Your code never leaves your machine when using local models. No telemetry.

Ready to try Loom?

Install in one line. No account needed. Works offline.

npm install -g loom-agent
View install guides
Loom— Local-first AI coding agent
